name: %blacksilence
description: Cancels TTS playback and disables TTS for a duration. Costs 500 meowDollars.

name: %maxwell
description: Spawns the animated Maxwell bread cat that bounces around the overlay. Costs 100 meowDollars.

name: %distract
description: Sends a random visual or audio distraction trinket to the stream.

name: %rotate
description: Rotates the model overlay with random speed and direction.

name: %goodnightkiss clear
description: Cancels the active goodnight kiss animation. Mod/broadcaster only.

name: %prediction
description: Creates a Twitch prediction. Format: %prediction <title>;<durationSec>;<option1>;<option2>. Mod/VIP/broadcaster only.

name: %mistake
description: Increments the mistake counter on the overlay. Costs 5000 meowDollars, applies -1000 karma.
